mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar, last_login_at, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, nickname, avatar, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar, last_login_at, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar, last_login_at, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` WHERE id IN
#{id}
